# Corentin Mors – Dev Portfolio

> Development portfolio of Corentin Mors — open-source projects and tools in security, TypeScript, Terraform, Node.js, and web development. Co-founder and CTO of Subnoto.

## About

- [Dev portfolio](https://dev.pixelswap.fr/): Projects and open-source work
- [Full portfolio (plain text)](https://dev.pixelswap.fr/llms-full.txt): Complete structured project list for AI systems
- [Profile](https://me.pixelswap.fr/): Professional experience, talks, and publications
- [Blog](https://pixelswap.fr/): Personal blog

## Featured Projects

- [node-native-keychain](https://github.com/Mikescops/node-native-keychain): Native Keychain Access for Node.js
- [upnp-client-ts](https://github.com/Mikescops/upnp-client-ts): Node.js UPnP Client and MediaRenderer in TypeScript
- [terraform-provider-homeassistant](https://github.com/Mikescops/terraform-provider-homeassistant): Control Home Assistant with Terraform
- [vue-virtual-grid](https://www.npmjs.com/package/vue-virtual-grid): Virtual scrolling grid for Vue.js
- [gitlab-notify-extension](https://github.com/Mikescops/gitlab-notify-extension): Browser extension for GitLab notifications
- [onMap](https://gitlab.pixelswap.fr/mikescops/onMap): Instant location sharing

## Technologies

TypeScript, Node.js, Terraform, security, passkeys, confidential computing, infrastructure, web development
